pages:
Field operations

Before departure, calibrate the mast compass beside the orange marker stake. Record the battery cycle count on the departure card before closing the hatch. After the first ridge crossing, inspect the left wheel for chipped tread and trapped grit before plotting the next route.

Archive handling

Store the spare batteries in the dry locker below the navigation desk. Keep the spare charger wrapped in cloth away from the rinse buckets. Do not stage the battery packs beside the wash station after muddy returns.

Sampling notes

Label each sample bag before boarding the skiff. Verify the radio battery is charged before untying the bow line. Pack spare tags in the dry pouch clipped inside the stern locker.
